title: Section 104
content: [Application of Act to properties given or donated by persons not professing Islam for support of certain 1[waqf]].--- Omitted by the Waqf (Amendment) Act, 2025 (14 of 2025), s. 43 (w.e.f. 08-04-2025).
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 27 of 2013, s. 4, for "wakf" (w.e.f. 1-11-2013).
